description_long: This set consists of four ornate perfume bottles, each with a bulbous, rounded base and a long, narrow neck wrapped in white and brown bands. The bottles are finished in glossy, metallic colors: deep blue, rich red, vibrant green, and warm copper, each with a gold-toned, scalloped base rim and small pointed feet for stability. The necks are wrapped in a textured, banded material, possibly simulating leather or cloth, adding a rustic and artisanal touch. The bottles' surfaces are highly reflective, giving them a luxurious and eye-catching appearance. No visible branding or text is present, and the tops appear to be capped but not intricately designed. These bottles would stand out as decorative personal care items in an urban environment, such as a boutique or upscale bathroom.
description: A group of four glossy, metallic perfume bottles with rounded bases, long necks wrapped in white bands, and gold-toned scalloped feet in blue, red, green, and copper colors.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four bottles, highlighting their glossy finishes and the white-banded necks, with the blue and red bottles most prominent.
description_view_1: Rear angled view emphasizing the copper and green bottles, with the gold-toned bases and banded necks clearly visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the rounded bases and the alignment of the bottles, with the green and red bottles in the foreground.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, focusing on the blue and copper bottles, with the reflective surfaces and banded necks catching the light.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The bottle cap is cylindrical, matching the neck in diameter, and is wrapped in white and brown bands. It appears to be removable and is simple in design, with no visible decorative elements or mechanisms.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: The silhouette is bulbous and rounded at the base, tapering smoothly into a long, narrow neck, with a flat top and small pointed feet, resembling a classic potion or apothecary bottle.
attribute_decorative_elements: White and brown banded neck wrap
